_meta.task: V1.4 high-precision seed inventory for solar_backdating
_meta.refinement: SAM2.1 mask+box prompt on detector polygons
_meta.notes: High-confidence candidate policy. On the 25-grid clean-GT proxy, score-only filtering did not reach 0.95 prediction purity; conf>=0.98 and sam_score>=0.98 is the highest-purity non-degenerate tested seed policy, but final precision target is Channel 1 per-stratum precision >= 0.95.
